<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-entrypoint-maps.php. -->
# Cms

Storefront and CMS-admin entry map for root shopping pages, blogs, public contact pages, and `/cms/*` admin settings.

## Use when

- blog
- Cms
- contact-us
- shop/*
- storefront

## Start here

- [Modules/Cms/Http/Controllers/CmsController.php](../../Modules/Cms/Http/Controllers/CmsController.php)
- [Modules/Cms/Resources/views/frontend](../../Modules/Cms/Resources/views/frontend)
- [Modules/Cms/Routes/web.php](../../Modules/Cms/Routes/web.php)

## Verified paths

### Routes

- [Modules/Cms/Routes/web.php](../../Modules/Cms/Routes/web.php) — storefront routes for `/`, `/shop/*`, backward-compatible `/c/*` redirects, and admin routes under `/cms/*`
- [Modules/Cms/Routes/api.php](../../Modules/Cms/Routes/api.php) — auth API placeholder route for `/cms`
